title: Soul Profile
description: Schema for profiles/<name>/profile.yaml — bundles skills, MCPs, and env for a Claude Code or Codex session.

name.description: kebab-case, must equal the directory name profiles/<name>/

description.description: One-line description shown in `cue list` and embedded in the materialized CLAUDE.md stamp.

icon.description: Optional emoji icon shown in picker and materialized CLAUDE.md header.

iconImage.description: Path to a PNG/JPG logo, relative to the profile dir. Rendered inline in Kitty terminals via the graphics protocol; falls back to `icon` emoji elsewhere.

bundles.description: Display-only list of profiles this one conceptually bundles. Rendered as `includes: a + b + c` next to the picker row. Does not drive resolution.

inherits.description: Parent profile name(s). Single string or array. Depth ≤ 3, cycles forbidden.

recommends.description: Companion profile names suggested at activation time (cue use prints them and offers to compose via 'a+b+c'). Metadata only — does not auto-merge skills/MCPs.

conflicts.description: Profile names that are mutually exclusive with this one (e.g. medusa-vite vs medusa-next — two storefront frameworks for the same backend). The picker disables the partner option in the combine-multiselect when this profile is checked.

mcps.description: MCP server IDs that must exist in cue/mcps/configs/. Accepts plain string or {id, agents} object.

env.description: Env vars set when this profile is materialized; values may contain ${VAR} placeholders.

rules.description: Rule files (relative to resources/rules/ or absolute) loaded into the session. Enforce coding standards, security policies, etc.

commands.description: Slash command files (relative to resources/commands/) scoped to this profile.

subagents.description: Claude Code subagent files (relative to resources/subagents/, no .md) scoped to this profile. Materialized flat into the runtime agents/ dir so Claude Code can delegate to them via the Task tool.

hooks.description: Hook scripts (relative to resources/hooks/) activated for this profile. Lifecycle: PreToolUse, PostToolUse, SessionStart, SessionEnd, Stop.

persona.description: Phase 1: multi-line role-priming text injected at the top of CLAUDE.md. Defines who the agent IS (a senior Rust engineer who defaults to safety), not just what tools it has.

persona_includes.description: Shared persona snippets (relative to resources/personas/, no .md). Read at materialize-time and prepended to the persona block, so cross-profile policies (Integrity Protocol, voice rules) live in one file instead of being copy-pasted. Inheritance: concat + dedupe across the chain.

playbooks.description: Phase 2: markdown playbooks (relative to resources/playbooks/) — proven step-by-step protocols for common tasks (ship-feature, triage-bug). Symlinked into runtime, indexed in CLAUDE.md.

qualityGates.description: Phase 3: Stop-hook validator scripts (relative to resources/quality-gates/) that veto 'done' if work doesn't meet the profile's bar (tests pass, lint clean, etc.).

evals.description: Phase 4: eval scenario refs (relative to resources/evals/) declaring 'for task X this profile should be able to handle it'. `cue eval-behavior` runs structural checks.

persona_routing.description: Phase 5: hand-tuned skill router rows merged into CLAUDE.md alongside the auto-built tables. Use sparingly — most routing should come from skill descriptions, not overrides.

phrase.description: Verbatim user-said trigger phrase. Reactive routing.

capability.description: Task shape — 'when you're about to do X'. Proactive routing.

skill.description: Skill slug to route to. Must exist in this profile's resolved skill list (validator W9).

note.description: Optional short context line rendered next to the row.

repo.description: Skill source passed to `npx skills add`: a GitHub 'org/repo' coordinate or a bare host that distributes skills (e.g. 'docs.stripe.com').

pin.description: Either 'git@<sha>' or 'tag@<version>'. Omitted = HEAD of default branch.
